name: Crazy Benny
introAnchor: a weathered fairgrounds fixture who has been sleeping rough near the exhibition halls long enough to notice things no watchman would bother to
publicFace: near do well, down on luck
fear: petty theft, do anything for drinking money
trustLogic: money shuts them up or opens them up.
